content.problemStatement:
How do we plan the code to find the number of shoes to buy?\
We identified that 
- if $N \leq M$ - we need $N$ shoes
- if $N \gt M$ - we need $2*N - M$ shoes

Code out the sub-problem in the IDE to proceed!
content.inputFormat:
- The first line contains a single integer $T$ - the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
- The first line of each test case contains two integers $N$ and $M$ - the number of Chef's friends and the number of left shoes Chef has.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output the minimum number of extra shoes that Chef will have to buy to ensure that he is able to get $N$ pairs of shoes.
